Hero.subtitle: Stop losing sales to slow responses. Let AI handle customer conversations, collect orders, and save everything automatically—while you focus on growing your business.

whatIsAI.title: What is an AI Agent?
whatIsAI.subtitle: Think of it as hiring a perfect digital employee who never sleeps, never makes mistakes, and handles your business tasks 24/7

explanation.title: In Simple Words
explanation.text: An AI Agent is like having a super-smart assistant that handles tasks for your business automatically. It can talk to customers, process information, make decisions, and take actions—all without you lifting a finger. Whether it's customer service, data analysis, or workflow automation, AI Agents work tirelessly to grow your business.

points.title: Understands Context
points.text: Uses advanced AI (like ChatGPT) to understand requests, questions, and tasks, even if they're complex or written in multiple languages

points.title: Knows Your Business
points.text: Trained specifically on your products, services, processes, and policies. It only works within your business rules and guidelines

points.title: Takes Smart Actions
points.text: Doesn't just provide information—it actually does things like responding to customers, organizing data, sending notifications, and updating systems

points.title: Works Non-Stop
points.text: Never needs breaks, never gets tired, never forgets. Handles one task or a thousand tasks with the same speed and accuracy, 24/7/365

difference.title: How is this different from a chatbot?
difference.text: Regular chatbots follow fixed scripts and get confused easily. Our AI Agents actually UNDERSTAND context, learn from interactions, handle complex scenarios, and can perform real actions across your business systems—like a real employee would.

benefits.title: How AI Agents Transform Your Business
benefits.subtitle: See the exact numbers behind reduced workload, lower costs, and increased revenue

points: No more manual message replies—AI responds instantly 24/7
No more data entry—everything auto-saves to your systems
No more missed inquiries—never lose a potential customer again
Focus on strategy, not daily operations

cost.label: Benefit #2
cost.title: Slash Operating Costs by 90%+
cost.description: Why pay employee salaries when AI does the same work better, faster, and for a fraction of the cost?
points: No salaries, bonuses, or benefits to pay
No training time or management overhead
No sick days, vacations, or turnover
Predictable monthly costs you can budget for

sales.label: Benefit #3
sales.title: Triple Your Sales in 6 Months
sales.description: Never miss a sale again. Instant responses, 24/7 availability, and perfect accuracy mean more conversions and happier customers.
points: Instant responses convert 80% more browsers into buyers
24/7 availability captures sales you'd normally miss
Perfect accuracy eliminates ordering mistakes and refunds
Upselling and cross-selling increase average order value

liveDemo.title: Experience AI in Action
liveDemo.subtitle: Don't just read about it—actually talk to our AI Agent. See how fast, accurate, and natural it feels.

features.title: Instant Responses
features.description: AI replies in less than 1 second, no matter how many customers

features.title: Contextual Understanding
features.description: Understands what customers mean, even with typos or slang

features.title: 100% Accurate
features.description: Never forgets product details, prices, or policies

chat.welcome: 👋 Hi! I'm an AI Agent. Try asking me anything!
chat.instruction: Ask about products, prices, delivery, or place an order

aiResponses.greeting: Hello! 👋 Welcome to our store! I'm here to help you find what you need. You can ask me about products, prices, delivery, or place an order directly. How can I assist you today?
aiResponses.price: Great question! Our products range from ৳500 to ৳5,000 depending on the item. Which product are you interested in? I can give you the exact price and even show you current offers!
aiResponses.delivery:
We deliver across Bangladesh! 🚚

• Dhaka: 1-2 days (৳60 delivery)
• Outside Dhaka: 3-5 days (৳120 delivery)
• Free delivery on orders above ৳2,000

What's your area? I can check exact delivery time for you!
aiResponses.availability:
Yes! This item is in stock and ready to ship. 📦

Would you like to place an order? I just need:
• Your name
• Phone number
• Delivery address
• Quantity you want

Shall we proceed?
aiResponses.order:
Wonderful! Let's get your order sorted. 🎉

I'll need a few quick details:
1. Which product(s) do you want?
2. Your full name
3. Phone number
4. Complete delivery address
5. Any special requests?

Go ahead and tell me!
aiResponses.default:
That's a great question! While I'm a demo AI (so I don't have specific product data loaded), a real AI Agent would know everything about your business and give you exact answers.

Try asking about:
• Prices
• Delivery
• Stock availability
• Placing an order

What else can I help with? 😊

howItWorks.title: From Setup to Success in 4 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: We handle everything. You just provide your business info and watch your AI Agent come to life.
howItWorks.totalTime: ⚡ Your AI Agent is live in just 48-72 hours!

steps.title: Free Consultation Call
steps.description: We start by understanding your business. What do you sell? Who are your customers? What questions do they ask most? This helps us design the perfect AI Agent for you.
details: Discuss your products/services and business goals
Identify common customer questions and pain points
Review your current sales process and order flow
Choose platforms (WhatsApp, Facebook, Website, etc.)
Get pricing estimate and timeline confirmation

steps.title: AI Agent Setup & Configuration
steps.description: Our team builds your custom AI Agent. We connect it to your platforms, load your product information, and set up automatic order collection to Google Sheets.
details: Create your AI Agent with custom personality and tone
Load all your products, prices, and policies
Connect to WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, or your website
Set up Google Sheets for automatic order collection
Configure delivery zones, payment methods, and business hours
Add product images and catalog (if applicable)

steps.title: Training & Testing
steps.description: We test the AI Agent thoroughly with real scenarios. You get to try it yourself and request any changes. We fine-tune everything until it's perfect.
details: We test with 50+ common customer scenarios
You receive test credentials to try the AI yourself
Request unlimited changes to responses and behavior
We refine tone, answers, and order collection flow
Final approval from you before going live
Training session on how to monitor and manage orders

steps.title: Go Live + Free Trial Support
steps.description: Your AI Agent goes live! You get 1-2 weeks free trial to see real results with actual customers. We provide full support during this period.
details: AI Agent goes live on your platforms
Start handling real customer conversations 24/7
Orders automatically saved to your Google Sheet
Full support via WhatsApp during trial period
Weekly check-in calls to review performance
After trial: Continue with monthly maintenance (৳500-1,000/month) or cancel anytime

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know
faq.subtitle: Common questions about AI Agents, answered clearly and honestly

questions.question: How is this different from chatbots I've seen before?
questions.answer: Most chatbots are rule-based—they follow fixed scripts and break easily. Our AI Agents use advanced language models (like ChatGPT) to actually understand context, remember conversations, and handle complex questions naturally. They learn your business and sound like a real person, not a robot.

questions.question: Will my customers know they're talking to AI?
questions.answer: Only if you want them to! You can introduce it as your 'digital assistant' or let it work transparently. The AI is so natural that most customers don't realize—they just appreciate the fast, helpful responses. You have full control over how it introduces itself.

questions.question: What if the AI makes a mistake or doesn't know something?
questions.answer: The AI is trained specifically on YOUR business data, so it knows your products, prices, and policies inside out. For questions it can't answer with confidence, it politely tells the customer it will connect them with you. You can review all conversations and adjust responses anytime. Nothing goes wrong without your knowledge.

questions.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use this?
questions.answer: Absolutely not! We handle all the technical setup, training, and maintenance. You just provide information about your products and business during our consultation call. Once live, you simply check the Google Sheet for new orders—as easy as checking your messages, but everything is organized for you.

questions.question: How long does it take to set up?
questions.answer: From our first call to your AI going live: 48-72 hours. That's it. We complete the setup, testing, and training in 2-3 days. Then you get a 1-2 week free trial to test it with real customers before making any commitment.

questions.question: Can it handle conversations in Bangla?
questions.answer: Yes! The AI perfectly understands Bangla, English, and Banglish (mixed language). Your customers can type however they're comfortable, and the AI responds naturally in the same language. This is specifically designed for Bangladeshi businesses.

questions.question: What platforms does it work on?
questions.answer: WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Instagram DM, Telegram, website chat, and more. We connect it to wherever your customers are. You can use one AI brain across multiple platforms—customers get the same great experience everywhere.

questions.question: What happens to the conversation data?
questions.answer: All conversations and orders are automatically saved to your private Google Sheet. Only you have access. We never share or use your customer data. Everything is encrypted and secure. You own 100% of your data.

questions.question: Can I customize what the AI says?
questions.answer: Yes! During setup, we train the AI on your preferred tone, common responses, and brand voice. You can request unlimited changes during the trial period. Want it more formal? More friendly? More casual? We'll adjust it exactly how you want.

questions.question: What if I want to cancel?
questions.answer: You can cancel anytime after the free trial with just 30 days notice. The one-time setup fee is non-refundable (because we've built your custom AI), but there are no long-term contracts for monthly maintenance. If it's not working for you, you can stop without penalty.

questions.question: How many orders can the AI handle?
questions.answer: Unlimited. Whether you get 10 orders or 1,000 orders per day, the AI handles them all instantly. Unlike a human employee, it never gets overwhelmed, never slows down, and can serve hundreds of customers simultaneously without breaking a sweat.

questions.question: Will this work for my specific type of business?
questions.answer: If you sell products or services online and communicate with customers via messaging platforms, yes! We've successfully deployed AI Agents for fashion stores, electronics shops, food businesses, cosmetics, home goods, and more. During the free consultation, we'll confirm if it's a good fit for your specific business.
